_comment: Add the scripts for your package manager to package.json. lockfile-lint supports npm and yarn ONLY — never add a lockfile-lint preinstall to a pnpm/bun project, it cannot parse their lockfiles and a failing preinstall breaks every install. pnpm/bun verify lockfile integrity natively on a --frozen-lockfile install, so they only need an audit script.

npm-or-yarn.audit:security: npm audit && npx lockfile-lint --path package-lock.json --type npm --allowed-hosts npm --validate-https
